articles.author: Fred Imbert, Justina Lee
articles.title: Stock futures edge higher, Asia mixed as renewed U.S.-Iran attacks push oil prices up: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: Wall Street is coming off a mixed week, characterized by a rotation out of tech and into other parts of the stock market.
articles.content: Stock futures edged higher early Monday as investors weighed a pause in hostilities between the U.S. and Iran, though uncertainty over the durability of the agreement kept concerns about Middle East … [+2663 chars]
